Glenn Phillips’ Stunning Left-Hand Switch Stuns Super Smash Fans

Jan 1, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Glenn Phillips Wows Fans With Unconventional Batting

Glenn Phillips left cricket fans amazed in the Super Smash 2025–26 when he switched to left-handed batting mid-match, showcasing his versatility and innovation. The Otago star stunned opponents and spectators alike, proving why he is one of New Zealand cricket’s most dynamic T20 players.
